What's going on? What I wanna do in this video is give you as many $2,000 bills as I humanly possibly can as fast as possible. And the reason I wanna do that is because I wanna give you that for referring friends. Because if you're not referring friends, you should feel bad. And the reason for that is because if you don't feel like referring friends, it means that we're not doing job. Or it means that you're a terrible person, you're making money and you don't want your friends to make money, which is not cool, right? Friends don't let friends be broke. That being said, what I wanna do is give you $2,000 for every single one of them that you refer. There's X period of weeks, I'm sure there's details underneath here about like they have to, you know, you get like, they have to stay obviously for X period of time and make sure you get the referral bonus. So you don't refer crazy people. But after that, and the reason I want to do that is because I want you to be a part of the mission that we're doing, right? I want you to feel like you're taking a part of it, but I don't want you to take time out of your day because I'm sure you're gonna have questions and people ask you, you know, hop on a call, explain things to them before they actually get introduced to us. And I wanna make sure that it's worth your time. So I would never ask you to do things that are not, that you don't get high ROI on, despite the fact that it is good of you to help your friends, okay? So that being said, make sure that you add them to the group, the high ticket, high volume selling group, that the free group that we have, make sure that when they apply that they put your name in the reference box where it's like, hey, how'd you hear about us? Like put your name in there. And then if they can also mention in the call, it's not required, but you know, better safe than sorry. And that way we can track it back to you so we can give you fat stacks of bills for helping your friends and being a generally good, awesome person. All right, so that is what you should do to refer friends because we always get that question and that is how you do it. Haaf!
